title: rostellularia adscendens subsp. adscendens
intro: Rostellularia adscendens subsp. adscendens, also known as the 'Greenhood Orchid' or 'Greenhood', is a species of flowering plant in the family Haemodoraceae. Rostellularia adscendens subsp. adscendens is a flowering plant native to Australia and is traditionally used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Rostellularia adscendens subsp. adscendens include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in reducing inflammation and treating infections. The health benefits of Rostellularia adscendens subsp. adscendens include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and is traditionally used in herbal preparations like teas and infusions.
